checks.evidence: standalone diagnostics HTML includes a restrictive Content-Security-Policy meta tag
fast-mlsirm CLI suppresses unexpected stack traces by default and preserves FAST_MLSIRM_DEBUG=1 for developer debugging
scrollable report tables expose a focusable region, table caption, and visible keyboard focus style
https://www.figma.com/design/qD34PfMH8Kr41tFdqLCkem records the buyer-review journey with Code Connect disabled
scripts/build_buyer_packet.py creates a portable zip and buyer_evidence_manifest.json with artifact coverage and SHA256 digests
scripts/build_buyer_packet.py creates buyer_evidence_report.html for human review of coverage, digests, contract value, and source commit
scripts/build_benchmark_report.py creates benchmark_report.json and benchmark_report.html from release acceptance timing
scripts/build_release_evidence_index.py creates release_evidence_index.json and release_evidence_index.html from dist, acceptance, benchmark, sales-readiness, and buyer-packet evidence
scripts/build_commercial_release.py creates commercial_release_manifest.json and commercial_release_report.html from the full release evidence pipeline

scripts/build_procurement_due_diligence.py creates procurement_due_diligence_manifest.json and procurement_due_diligence_report.html for package metadata, policy-file, commercial-release, GitHub snapshot, and SHA256 report evidence

scripts/build_pr_queue_governance.py creates pr_queue_governance_manifest.json and pr_queue_governance_report.html for open PR review, stale/change-requested risk counts, release-scope conflict classification, and SHA256 report evidence

go_no_go.caveat: This scorecard is procurement evidence, not a sales guarantee or regulated-use approval.
